title: alyssum lapeyrouseanum var. tortuosum
intro: Alyssum lapeyrouseanum var. tortuosum, also known as creeping alyssum, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, helping to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of creeping alyssum include its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
